underlying_goal: Modernize a legacy PHP 7.0 website to run on PHP 8.4 with updated dependencies, secure authentication, and improved code quality
friction_detail: User stopped assistant mid-task to require subagents and confirmation for complex routing; database pivot table column inference changed between Laravel versions requiring explicit foreign keys
brief_summary: User requested PHP version upgrade from 7.0 to 8.4 with full codebase modernization and got a working PHP 8.4 site with updated dependencies, secure bcrypt auth, PHPStan level 5 passing, and 14 remaining baseline errors.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Always use subagents for complex tasks and confirm before proceeding with complex routing issues
